name: Foolproof Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch, sugar and water in a bowl. Cook until clear, then set aside.
2. Add salt to the egg whites. Whip until foamy or forming stiff peaks.
3. Gradually add the cornstarch mixture to the whipped egg whites. Continue beating until creamy.
4. Gradually add the remaining sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, and beat until smooth after each addition.
5. Spoon onto your favorite cream filling pie.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
